languages.text: "Я не посрамлю славное имя Династии фон Валанциус. Обещаю".

traits.locale_text: "Я не посрамлю славное имя Династии фон Валанциус. Обещаю".

languages.text: "I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."
languages.original_text: "Я не посрамлю славное имя Династии фон Валанциус. Обещаю".

traits.locale_text: "I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."
"I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."
"I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."

languages.text: 「栄えあるフォン・ヴァランシウス家の名に泥を塗るような真似は、決していたしない。絶対に」
languages.original_text: "I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."

traits.locale_text: 「栄えあるフォン・ヴァランシウス家の名に泥を塗るような真似は、決していたしません。誓います。」

languages.text: « Je ne ternirai pas le nom glorieux de la dynastie von Valancius. J'en fais le serment. »
languages.original_text: "I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne ternirai pas le nom glorieux de la dynastie von Valancius. J'en fais le serment. »

languages.text: "Von Valancius hanedanlığının şanlı adına leke sürdürmeyeceğim. Buna yemin ederim."
languages.original_text: "I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."

traits.locale_text: "Von Valancius hanedanlığının şanlı adına leke sürdürmeyeceğim. Buna yemin ederim."

languages.text: "Ich werde den ruhmreichen Namen der Dynastie derer von Valancius nicht entehren. Das schwöre ich."
languages.original_text: "I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde den ruhmreichen Namen der Dynastie derer von Valancius nicht entehren. Das schwöre ich."

languages.text: «No deshonraré el glorioso nombre de la dinastía von Valancius. Lo juro».
languages.original_text: "I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."

traits.locale_text: «No deshonraré el glorioso nombre de la dinastía von Valancius. Lo juro».

languages.text: “我发誓，我绝不会玷污冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的荣耀之名。”
languages.original_text: "I will not dishonour the glorious name of the von Valancius dynasty. I swear it."

traits.locale_text: “我发誓，我绝不会玷污冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的荣耀之名。”
